'''zadovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uglyism|uglyism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uglyism|uglyism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zadovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædeveth|zædeveth]] || [[word:zædevej|zædevej]] || [[word:zædevesh|zædevesh]] || [[word:zædeve|zædeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadodovoth|zadodovoth]] || [[word:zadodovoj|zadodovoj]] || [[word:zadodovosh|zadodovosh]] || [[word:zadodovo|zadodovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadovoth|zadovoth]] || [[word:zadovoj|zadovoj]] || [[word:zadovosh|zadovosh]] || [[word:zadovo|zadovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadofvoth|zadofvoth]] || [[word:zadofvoj|zadofvoj]] || [[word:zadofvosh|zadofvosh]] || [[word:zadofvof|zadofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadovotho|zadovotho]] || [[word:zadovojo|zadovojo]] || [[word:zadovosho|zadovosho]] || [[word:zadovoko|zadovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadovoth|zadovoth]] || [[word:zadovoj|zadovoj]] || [[word:zadovosh|zadovosh]] || [[word:zadovo|zadovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadovothol|zadovothol]] || [[word:zadovojol|zadovojol]] || [[word:zadovoshol|zadovoshol]] || [[word:zadovokol|zadovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadovothotho|zadovothotho]] || [[word:zadovojojo|zadovojojo]] || [[word:zadovoshosho|zadovoshosho]] || [[word:zadovoko|zadovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadovothon|zadovothon]] || [[word:zadovojon|zadovojon]] || [[word:zadovoshon|zadovoshon]] || [[word:zadovokon|zadovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadovothoro|zadovothoro]] || [[word:zadovojoro|zadovojoro]] || [[word:zadovoshoro|zadovoshoro]] || [[word:zadovokoro|zadovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
